images.label: Task 1 cover image
images.description: A visual introduction to Jack's difficult day, highlighting the theme that everything begins to go wrong before an important presentation.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 1
images.description: Jack is presented as a hardworking student who has spent a long time preparing for an important team presentation.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 2
images.description: Bright sunlight and Jack's shocked reaction suggest that he has overslept and suddenly realized he is late.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 3
images.description: Jack rushes out with his bag and laptop, then realizes at the subway station that he forgot his wallet and student ID.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 4
images.description: On a crowded train, Jack drops his phone and nearly falls, showing how stressful and chaotic his morning has become.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 5
images.description: A woman gives Jack a folded note with a strange message telling him to stay on the train and get off at the last station.

images.label: Task 1 Scene 6
images.description: Jack feels tense and uncertain as he tries to decide whether he should trust the mysterious message or get off early to reach class in time.
